notes: DeepSeek's FP8/FP4 GEMM kernel library for Hopper/Blackwell, used as a MoE backend by vLLM/SGLang. "Deep" + "GEMM" (General Matrix Multiply). Pronunciation is genuinely split: most HPC/BLAS practitioners say GEMM as a single word rhyming with "gem"/"hem" (mirroring how S-GEMM = "ess-jem", D-GEMM = "dee-jem" are spoken), giving DEEP-jem. Others spell it out, deep-G-E-M-M. README gives no phonetic guidance. STRESS: DEEP-jem.
